title: Auto Resize Column Width?
excerpt: Would be super helpful to have a feature where you can double-click the Resize Column and it will auto-resize to the length of the header, the same as it does in Excel/Google Sheets etc.

posts.author: dpeet (Daina)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be super helpful to have a feature where you can double-click the Resize Column and it will auto-resize to the length of the header, the same as it does in Excel/Google Sheets etc.

posts.author: IDKFA (James)
posts.cookedHtml: second this. As a solutions partner I burn SOOO much time on mundane stuff like this that should be a double click

posts.author: pirarkam (Pir Arkam)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. Please add this feature. Also it will be great to add a feature where all of the negative spacing goes out… Similar to Gmail (Compact View)
